text:
Chronic Condition Warehouse 
CODEBOOK: Medicare Part D Pharmacy Characteristics │ April 2021 │ V 1.1 
6 
EPRSCRB_SRVC_IND 
LABEL: 
E-Prescribing Services Indicator 
DESCRIPTION: This variable is an indicator as to whether or not the pharmacy accepts electronic prescriptions 
(computer to computer). 
SHORT NAME: — 
LONG NAME: EPRSCRB_SRVC_IND 
TYPE: 
CHAR 
LENGTH: 
1 
SOURCE: 
NCDPD DataQ™ 
VALUES: 
Y = Yes, pharmacy offers e-prescribing. 
N = No, pharmacy does not offer e-prescribing.
